'''Horace Wyrmyr''' was [[Academy Dean]] of the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Academy of Carida]] who participated in the expulsion trial of [[Cadet/Legends|Cadet]] [[Mako Spince]]. Wyrmyr lived in the [[Dean's Residence]] and was the seventeenth and final dean to have [[ZZ-4Z]], whom he disliked, serve as his housekeeper.

==Behind the scenes==
Horace Wyrmyr was a reference to [[Wikipedia:Dean Wormer|Dean Wormer]] from the film [[Wikipedia:National Lampoon's Animal House|''Animal House'']].<ref name="fryblog">{{Tumblr|subdomain=jasonfry|url=post/23995413972/eg-to-warfare-endnotes-pt-9|name=Jason Fry's Dorkery|text=EG to Warfare: Endnotes Pt. 9}}</ref>
